title: Villager voices
description: Have you ever seen those AI videos with a text spoke by a villager? Guess what, it's coming to Minecraft! Every villager sound is replaced with an AI version of it, to make it a bit more human
body:
This simple resource pack changes the villager sounds to something more.. Human. It uses AI to give the villager an actual voice, trying to reproduce the sounds they'll do, with words.

Currently, 2/18 sounds are changed, more to come!
- hit1.ogg
- yes1.ogg
